creator: zaphod@berentweb.com
text:
Hi

> py-gnome2 pulls in gettext-tools, so I assume a patch is not
> necessairely. Feedback? (Or close?).  

Latest build attempt, Poudriere log snippet from
build of soundconverter-2.1.6 at Thu Feb 1, 2018

checking for intltool-extract... /usr/local/bin/intltool-extract
checking for xgettext... no
checking for msgmerge... no
checking for msgfmt... no
checking for gmsgfmt... no
configure: error: GNU gettext tools not found; required for intltool
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
